APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBIN D. HART, TEL. NO. (510) 273-2435 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES A. MICHEL, TEL. NO. 951-4949 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GARRETT PALINES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS Granted per the stipulation of the parties filed November 10, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

ELIZABETH MACDONALD, Esq. special appearance HERITAGE PACIFIC FINANCIAL, LLC,
Plaintiff's Witness: BENJAMIN GANTER was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) GARRETT PALINES for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $137,798.27
Costs - $370.00
Total judgment in the amount of $138,168.27

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
